name: Arif Hossain
bio: Met during freshman year at BRUR. We used to pull all-nighters before exams together. Now he's doing his MBA in Dhaka.

name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: Grew up in the same neighborhood in Rangpur. She moved to Chittagong for work but we still talk every week.

name: Tanvir Ahmed
bio: Senior developer I met at a web dev bootcamp. He helped me understand React deeply and still reviews my code sometimes.

name: Lamia Sultana
bio: We were in the same MIS study group for two years. She's now working at a fintech startup in Sylhet.

name: Rakibul Islam
bio: Best friend since school. We still play PUBG every weekend and roast each other endlessly. Irreplaceable.

name: Sadia Rahman
bio: We built our final year project together and almost lost our minds doing it. Great teammate and a genuinely kind person.

name: Imtiaz Chowdhury
bio: Our families have known each other for decades. Lost touch after he moved to Canada for his undergrad. Need to reconnect.

name: Fariha Akter
bio: Connected on LinkedIn after she commented on my post about learning React. We've had really good conversations about product thinking and tech careers.
